testcase.name: Unauthenticated user redirected to login for protected routes - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the application is running............................................passed Given I am not logged in....................................................passed When I navigate to "/dashboard".............................................passed Then I should be redirected to "/login" with a "callbackUrl" of "/dashboard"..passed

testcase.name: Navigation bar is hidden on public routes for unauthenticated users - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the application is running............................................passed Given I am not logged in....................................................passed When I navigate to "/"......................................................passed Then I should not see the authenticated navigation bar......................passed And I should not see a link to "/dashboard".................................passed And I should not see a link to "/opportunities".............................passed And I should not see a link to "/messages"..................................passed And I should not see a link to "/posting-queue".............................passed And I should not see a link to "/settings"..................................passed

testcase.name: Expired session cookie is cleared and user is redirected to login
testcase.system-out: Given the application is running............................................passed Given I have an expired session cookie......................................passed When I navigate to "/dashboard".............................................passed Then I should be redirected to "/login".....................................passed And the "__session" cookie should be cleared................................passed

testcase.name: Only whitelisted routes are reachable without authentication - #1.1
Only whitelisted routes are reachable without authentication - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given the application is running............................................passed Given I am not logged in....................................................passed When I navigate to "/login".................................................passed Then the response status code should be 200.................................passed
